reviews.comment:
Muy mala atención, fui un domingo a la tarde,pregunté si podía pagar específicamente con débito cigarrillos, cuando fui a la caja con varios productos y la misma chica que me dijo que si no me quiso cobrar

(Translated by Google)
Very bad service. I went on a Sunday afternoon and asked if I could pay specifically for cigarettes with a debit card. When I went to the checkout with several items, the same girl who had told me I couldn't pay refused.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15539995661554460615/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtcWN6eEhREAE
